location: On a corpse under a table at the far end of a chamber west of the "Storehouse, Back Section" Site of Grace, inside the Specimen Storehouse (part of Shadow Keep). Reachable only via the Church District entrance/elevator, not the main Shadow Keep gate.
region: Shadow Keep (Specimen Storehouse, Shadow of the Erdtree DLC)

source.name: Corpse west of Storehouse, Back Section grace, guarded by a Fire Knight

tactics: Reach East Scadu Altus via the tunnel under Moorth Ruins, then enter Shadow Keep through the Church District (not the main plaza gate) to unlock the elevator into the Specimen Storehouse's Back Section
From the Storehouse, Back Section grace, head west into a chamber guarded by a tall, red Fire Knight (heavy, slow but hard-hitting telegraphed swings) plus a few shadow-aligned casters/soldiers
The shield sits on a corpse under a table at the room's far end — try to pull the Fire Knight into a doorway/corridor to fight it apart from its escorts
Don't confuse this with the Dueling Shield's Fire Knight fight elsewhere in the same Storehouse building — they are two separate encounters in two separate rooms
lore: A silver, glintstone-studded shield that lets its bearer thrust and block in the same motion. It was the shield Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, carried for the one ritual duel she fought to prove her devotion to the Erdtree.

builds.name: Carian quality-int hybrid
builds.why: Balanced Strength/Dexterity/Intelligence scaling (D/D/D) plus a large built-in magic attack split gives it a caster-melee feel similar to Moonveil-style hybrids, without needing a magic infusion

builds.name: Quality duelist off-hand
builds.why: Its physical scaling alone supports a standard quality (STR/DEX) build wanting an aggressive block-and-poke weapon in place of a normal shield
